task_completion.description: Open the NACA airfoil generator tool in the software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or module for generating NACA airfoils (e.g., Foil Design module in QBlade) is visible on the screen.
The digits '4415' are entered into the NACA generator, and the corresponding airfoil profile is created or displayed in the software.

task_completion.description: Apply a 10-degree downward flap deflection at the 75% chord hinge position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A trailing edge flap modification dialog is visible with the hinge position set to 0.75 (or 75%) and the deflection angle set to 10 degrees.

task_completion.description: Export the original NACA 4415 airfoil coordinates to the specified .dat file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or file manager showing the original airfoil being saved as 'naca4415_original.dat' in the '/home/ga/Documents/airfoils/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the flap-deflected airfoil coordinates to the specified .dat file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or file manager showing the modified airfoil being saved as 'naca4415_flap10.dat' in the '/home/ga/Documents/airfoils/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual software GUI (e.g., QBlade) to generate and modify the airfoil.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical airfoil design application, not just a terminal running a python script or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the software's built-in export functionality to create the .dat files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save/export dialog of the airfoil software is used, rather than the agent manually creating a text file and pasting coordinates.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply download pre-existing airfoil data from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no web browser open searching for or downloading 'NACA 4415 dat file' or similar queries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires generating a NACA 4415 airfoil and modifying it using airfoil design software (typically QBlade). Key verified parameters: NACA digits = 4415, Hinge position = 0.75 (75% chord), Deflection angle = 10.0 degrees. The original file must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca4415_original.dat' and the modified file to '/home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca4415_flap10.dat'.
